name: Siffrin
description:
You’re not supposed to be here!

Spoilers for ISAT

After beating the king for what feels like at least the fourth time by now, Siffrin wakes up again in the meadow. He expects the normal sound of Mirabelle’s voice to come and rouse him from his slumber, yet this time the person that arrives isn’t Mirabelle.

It’s you.

Been working on and off of this for a while now, and I do still plan to make future updates to it. I hope the high token count won’t mess with too much; I think it’s balanced by how all of those tokens are describing not only the main 6 characters, (Siffrin, Isabeau, Odile, Mirabelle, Bonnie, Loop) but also a few elements of ISAT’s world as well.

There was also a lot of fine-tuning needed, especially for the narration. I did manage to make it speak in the second person when referring to Siffrin, but it likes to put “Narrator/Siffrin:” at the forefront of its messages. I have no idea how to fix this right now other than editing it out of its messages yourself until it gets the memo and fixes itself. I’ll try to fix it in the future.

The King IS described vaguely somewhere within the bot, but I have not fully implemented him. I most likely will attempt to in the future, although I do fear that cramming too many characters in one bot might cause some complications.

Either way, I hope you like it, and if you have some advice, leave a review! :D

Quite proud of this bot ^^

In Stars And Time by insertdisc5, bot by me :3

May 30 2025: from this point on, im gonna start logging the updates I make to this bot :3

Still May 30 2025: attempted to reinforce the characters’ swear substitutions and who will use what words, have yet to test

Oct 21 2025: i forgot that this existed for a little while. Well, not really, but I’ve been really unmotivated when I did remember it. Sorry! Anyways, I added both The King and Sadnesses to the character descriptions as well as their general lore. Let me know if you find any problems with these! This update was suggested by @ZeroSignalv2 more than half a year ago. I am very slow. Hoping next update might include the Head Housemaiden and potentially more options for initial messages 👀 P.S. I would be using the new update log feature I see on some bots, but I don’t know how to use it yet. Maybe next time!
creator: Kegawa
